meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Solve Debugging Bottlenecks for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with cryptic bugs. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate debugging and ship production-ready SaaS apps faster.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates debugging friction by standardizing architecture and enforcing strict type-safety. By integrating Claude Code, you transform your codebase into a self-documenting system that catches errors before runtime. This workflow reduces manual troubleshooting by 80%, allowing you to focus on shipping client features instead of chasing ghosts.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal full of red text, the client deadline is breathing down your neck, and your previous attempts to fix the stack trace have only birthed three new, more exotic bugs. We have all been there—lost in the labyrinth of spaghetti code, wondering why the logic that worked in development is failing in production. It is the silent killer of freelance velocity.

But the era of manual debugging is over. By deploying the Antigravity project template, you move from 'fixing' to 'architecting'. This isn't just about cleaner code; it's about building a robust, AI-navigable structure that allows tools like Claude Code to act as an autonomous pair programmer, identifying the root cause of failures in seconds rather than hours.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Standardize your project structure to ensure all modules are isolated and testable, which is critical for AI-assisted debugging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project scaffold using the Antigravity standard architecture with strict TypeScript, modular routing, and pre-configured error boundary patterns.

steps.title: Inject Automated Error Boundaries
steps.description: Wrap your critical service layers in standardized error handlers to ensure the AI can parse stack traces without noise.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply the Antigravity error boundary middleware to all API routes and service layer functions to ensure structured logging.

steps.title: Contextualize the Debugging Environment
steps.description: Feed your project architecture into Claude Code so it understands the relationship between your modules before troubleshooting.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive project context map for Claude Code, focusing on dependencies and state management flow.

steps.title: Execute Automated Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Use Claude Code to trace the failure path based on your Antigravity-structured error logs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current error logs against the Antigravity schema and identify the exact line of code causing the state mismatch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Analyze logs in /logs/error.log and fix the service layer bug based on Antigravity patterns'

steps.title: Verify and Implement Defensive Patches
steps.description: Validate the fix using automated tests and commit the changes into the standardized Antigravity flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify the proposed fix against existing unit tests and ensure it adheres to the Antigravity defensive programming standard.

pro_tips: Always maintain a clean 'context.md' file in the root directory to help Claude Code understand your business logic constraints.
Use Antigravity's 'strict-mode' config to force compile-time errors that prevent runtime debugging nightmares.
Map your error codes to specific documentation URLs in your logs so the AI can retrieve context-aware solutions faster.
Run 'claude diff' before accepting any auto-generated fix to ensure the architectural integrity of your Antigravity template remains intact.
Integrate a custom 'debug-plan.json' in your workspace that Claude Code can read to understand your preferred troubleshooting sequence.
content.next_steps: Once your first bug is squashed, begin integrating automated performance monitoring into your Antigravity template to catch latency issues before they become support tickets.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the code and start mastering your workflow. By leveraging the Antigravity template, you reclaim your time and deliver professional-grade software that keeps clients coming back. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
